arts.ttl: We are maybe worst team in Man Utd history - Amorim
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim calls his side "maybe the worst in Manchester United history," but refuses to change his ideals despite recent struggles.

arts.ttl: Why are Man Utd struggling in Amorim's system?
arts.sum: Match Of The Day 2 pundits Leon Osman and Fara Williams discuss Manchester United's tactical struggles under new coach Ruben Amorim, as well as his stern criticism of his side after a 3-1 loss to Brighton.

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer latest: Alejandro Garnacho outcome nearing amidst interest from Premier League, Serie A?
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho is reportedly a target for both Napoli and Chelsea amidst speculation that he could leave Manchester United this month, and his exit may be nearing.

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Rangers
arts.sum: Branding his team as "maybe the worst" in Manchester United history shows the frustration and pressure is growing, and although Amorim sought to provide clarity ahead of Rangers' visit, such slip-ups are bound to be pounced upon. The cool demeanour once presented by Ruben Amorim is starting to fade in Manchester, with the slick Portuguese boss already showing signs of wear amid the size of the job at his disposal.

arts.ttl: EL 2024/25 state of play: Man Utd, Spurs and Rangers looking to secure top-eight spot
arts.sum: The revamped Europa League league stage is coming towards a conclusion.

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho Man United transfer takes fresh twist as new £42.3m 'approach' made

arts.ttl: I won't be deluded about Man Utd problems - Amorim
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim steps back from his description of his team as possibly the worst in Manchester United history but says they have major problems.

arts.ttl: 'Ruben Amorim is Wrong - I Played in a Worse Man United Side Than This One'
